title: Coretext Coretext Graph Ledger
description: The deterministic, typed edge graph mapping system state, active agents, and code to architectural intent and historical provenance.

source.description: The source file path or glob pattern (e.g., agent prompt, source code file).

target.description: The target file path being linked to.

type.description: Defines how Coretext routes the target context. 'full': Mandatory full-text injection. 'hint': Inject just the title as a hint so that the agent can decide whether to read it or not.

description.description: Agent's detailed reasoning or intent for the link (e.g., 'use'). Used to provide context regarding why this link exists in the injection payload.

hook.description: Specifies when the injection should occur: on read_file, write_file, or both.
